color_story: Full moon at 0.999 illumination drives maximum contrast: indigo-tinted cool grays (H:245°, S:5–10%) create a near-monochromatic field of morning frost. Spring green (H:142°) appears once per viewport as the sole chromatic note — alive and undeniable against austere neutrals. No second accent; the palette's tension lives in restraint and that single saturated green.
